description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: test, test_master, and deploy. Add a test job that runs only for merge_requests, uses the shakti-runner tag, and executes: export PATH="/home/gitlab-runner/.pyenv/bin:$PATH", eval "$(pyenv init -)", eval "$(pyenv init --path)", eval "$(pyenv virtualenv-init -)", pyenv activate venv, source /tools/setup_cclass_new_spike.sh, pip install --upgrade pip, pip uninstall aapg -y, pip install -r aapg/requirements.txt, pip install -e ., aapg --help, and pytest tests/test_aapg.py -m "serial" -v. Add a test_master job that runs only on the master branch with the same tag and identical script steps. Add a deploy job that runs only on the master branch, also on shakti-runner, performs the same environment setup commands, then runs pip install --upgrade pip, pip uninstall aapg -y, pip install twine, pip install semver, pip install python-gitlab, python setup.py sdist, python -m twine upload --username $shaktipypiusername --password $shaktipypassword dist/*, and finally python /scratch/version-extract-rst.py. No Docker image, services, caches, or artifacts are defined.
